risky_cuts.reason: User registration is a fundamental entry point for the application and cannot be deferred.
Subscription to paid plans is revenue-critical; deferring it blocks monetization.
Banning users is a high-risk security and moderation essential feature to prevent platform abuse.
Password reset is essential for account recovery; deferring it will lead to permanent user lockouts.

over_kept.reason: Viewing learning streaks is a gamification feature, not essential for the core MVP learning loop.
Personalized scenario recommendations require complex algorithms and can be deferred in favor of standard lists.
AI quality score overviews are advanced QA/analytics tools not required for the primary user experience.
Core metrics dashboard is an internal analytics feature that can be deferred for an MVP.
